---
title: "Kartogramy"
output: html_notebook
---



```{r}
# ===============================================================
# PRZYGOTOWANIE DANYCH
# ===============================================================

library(sf)
library(tmap)
library(dplyr)
library(stringi)

stability_table <- tabela_pelna %>%
  rename(
    MeanPos = Srednia_Pozycja,
    Min_Pos = Min_Poz,
    Max_Pos = Max_Poz,
    Range = Rozpietosc
  )

```


```{r}
# ===============================================================
# WCZYTANIE SHAPEFILE
# ===============================================================

pow <- read_sf("powiaty/powiaty.shp")

wojew <- pow %>%
  filter(substr(JPT_KOD_JE, 1, 2) == "32")  # zachodniopomorskie

```

```{r}
# ===============================================================
# DOPASOWANIE NAZW
# ===============================================================

clean_text <- function(x) {
  x <- tolower(x)
  x <- gsub("powiat ", "", x)
  x <- gsub("m\\. ", "", x)
  x <- trimws(x)
  x <- stri_trans_general(x, "Latin-ASCII")
  return(x)
}

nazwy_shp <- clean_text(wojew$JPT_NAZWA_)
nazwy_tab <- clean_text(stability_table$Powiat)

# sprawdzenie
print(setdiff(nazwy_tab, nazwy_shp))

# dopasowanie kodów
stability_table$JPT_KOD_JE <- wojew$JPT_KOD_JE[
  match(nazwy_tab, nazwy_shp)
]
```

```{r}
# ===============================================================
# ŁĄCZENIE
# ===============================================================

razem <- left_join(wojew, stability_table, by = "JPT_KOD_JE")

if(sum(is.na(razem$Range)) > 0){
  stop("BŁĄD: nie dopasowano wszystkich powiatów")
}
```

```{r}
# ===============================================================
# MAPA STABILNOŚCI
# ===============================================================

razem$Range <- as.numeric(razem$Range)

razem$Stabilnosc <- factor(
  razem$Range,
  levels = sort(unique(razem$Range))
)

levels(razem$Stabilnosc) <- paste0("rozpiętość = ", levels(razem$Stabilnosc))

paleta <- colorRampPalette(c("#b30047", "#fff7fb"))(length(levels(razem$Stabilnosc)))

mapa <- tm_shape(razem) +
  tm_polygons(
    col = "Stabilnosc",
    palette = paleta,
    title = "Rozpiętość pozycji",
    colorNA = "white",
    textNA = "",
    lwd = 0.5
  )  +
  tm_layout(
    frame = FALSE,
    legend.outside = TRUE,
    legend.title.size = 1.2,
    legend.text.size = 0.9
  )

mapa

tmap_save(mapa, "mapa_stabilnosc.png", width = 8, height = 6, dpi = 300)
```

```{r}
# ===============================================================
# MAPA POZIOMU ROZWOJU
# ===============================================================

razem <- razem %>%
  arrange(MeanPos) %>%
  mutate(
    klasa = rep(1:7, each = 3)
  )

razem$Rozwoj_kat <- factor(
  razem$klasa,
  levels = 1:7,
  labels = c(
    "bardzo wysoki",
    "wysoki",
    "umiarkowany",
    "średni",
    "niski",
    "bardzo niski",
    "ekstremalnie niski"
  )
)

paleta_niebieska <- c(
  "bardzo wysoki" = "#041f4a",
  "wysoki" = "#08306b",
  "umiarkowany" = "#08519c",
  "średni" = "#2171b5",
  "niski" = "#4292c6",
  "bardzo niski" = "#9ecae1",
  "ekstremalnie niski" = "#f7fbff"
)

mapa1 <- tm_shape(razem) +
  tm_polygons(
    col = "Rozwoj_kat",
    palette = paleta_niebieska,
    title = "Poziom rozwoju",
    colorNA = "white",
    textNA = "",
    lwd = 0.5
  )  +
  tm_layout(
    frame = FALSE,
    legend.outside = TRUE,
    legend.title.size = 1.2,
    legend.text.size = 0.9
  )

mapa1

tmap_save(mapa1, "mapa_rozwoj.png", width = 8, height = 6, dpi = 300)
```
